name: Garlic Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large soup pot.
2. Add onion and garlic. Cook over medium heat for 10-12 minutes until the onion and garlic begin to caramelize.
3. Add white wine and continue cooking for 10 minutes.
4. Add chicken stock and bay leaf. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
5. Add bread cubes. Allow soup to sit without heat for 10 minutes.
6. Remove the bay leaf. Puree the soup until smooth using a hand-held blender.
7. Stir in heavy cream and season with salt and pepper as needed.
8. Serve in shallow bowls, garnished with gruyere cheese.
